children.text: the State involved submits to the Secretary a description of the purposes for which the State intends to expend the grant;
the description identifies the populations, areas, and localities in the State with a need for the services or activities described in ;section 300k(a) of this title

the description provides information relating to the services and activities to be provided, including a description of the manner in which the services and activities will be coordinated with any similar services or activities of public and private entities; and
the description provides assurances that the grant funds will be used in the most cost-effective manner.
